name: Dowel Leg Wooden Dining Table Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Create a simple yet elegant dining space with the Dowel Leg Wooden Dining Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This brown dining table is designed in a rectangular shape with four dowel legs for a sophisticated look. Made of wood, this piece easily integrates into your existing decor style.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
